hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'pnpm-lock\.yaml|package-lock\.json'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit lock files directly — use pnpm install' >&2; exit 2; fi

command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(astro|css|ts)$'; then cd ~/Documents/projects/mvoitko.github.io && pnpm build 2>&1; BUILD_EXIT=$?; if [ $BUILD_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo 'BUILD FAILED' >&2; fi; exit $BUILD_EXIT; fi
